assertions.assertion: Response warns that the issuer URI (iss claim) must remain the same after migration
assertions.rationale: States 'The issuer URI (iss claim in tokens) must remain identical after migration.'

assertions.assertion: Response explains that changing the issuer breaks existing tokens and/or client trust relationships
assertions.rationale: Lists 4 consequences: existing tokens invalid, client trust breaks, resource servers reject tokens, discovery URLs change.

assertions.assertion: Response recommends setting options.IssuerUri explicitly in the Duende IdentityServer configuration
Response suggests checking the current /.well-known/openid-configuration discovery document to find the existing issuer value
assertions.rationale: Shows curl command to check /.well-known/openid-configuration and extract the issuer value.
